footer.description: Discover the heart of rural tranquility with curated village experiences built for slow travel.

hero.title: Discover the Heart of the Countryside.
hero.description: Thoughtfully designed village stays, cultural experiences, and slow travel escapes for travelers who prefer atmosphere over noise.

featuredDestinations.title: Featured Destinations
featuredDestinations.description: Hand-picked villages that offer a true glimpse into the soul of the rural landscape.

popularExperiences.title: Popular Experiences
popularExperiences.description: Go beyond sightseeing with immersive local activities.

localConnections.title: Authentic local connections
localConnections.description: Stay with families and engage in traditions passed down through generations.

sustainableTourism.title: Sustainable tourism
sustainableTourism.description: We reinvest a portion of every booking directly into local village infrastructure.

expertGuides.title: Expert guides
expertGuides.description: Native storytellers know every secret trail, ritual, and hidden legend.

seamlessBooking.title: Seamless booking
seamlessBooking.description: Verified stays with clear policies and calm, structured checkout flows.

header.title: Explore Villages
header.description: Discover curated rural sanctuaries tailored for meaningful stays, immersive activities, and slower travel.

hero.title: Confirm and Pay
hero.description: Finalize your booking with a calm, structured checkout flow designed to keep the experience clear and low-friction.

form.requestsPlaceholder: Dietary requirements, early check-in, or high-floor preference...
form.securePayment: Your payment information is encrypted and securely processed.

errors.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.requestsMin: Add a few details for your stay.
errors.checkOut: Please select a check-out date after check-in.

summary.contribution: Your stay contributes to the restoration of local riverbanks and village infrastructure.

items.sarah: The most peaceful place I have ever stayed. Waking up to the sound of the river and the view of the rice fields felt magical.
items.marcus: Incredible attention to detail. The local guide made sure we discovered places we never would have found alone.

destinationPage.bookingCardDescription: A calm, design-led booking card with enough structure to support the public flow while keeping the focus on the destination.

hero.title: A curated platform for village travel that feels clear, local, and trustworthy.
hero.description: Desa Wisata helps travelers discover rural stays, cultural experiences, and village-led hospitality through a calm booking flow and localized content. We focus on places where the story is as important as the stay.

story.title: What we are building
story.description: We design a village tourism experience around three things: clear discovery, thoughtful presentation, and a booking journey that keeps the focus on people and place. The result is a platform that feels editorial without becoming complicated.

discover.title: Discover with context
discover.description: Each destination is introduced with practical details, atmosphere, and reasons to visit so travelers can compare places quickly.

book.title: Book with confidence
book.description: The public flow is intentionally simple, with enough structure to make decisions clear and the process easy to follow.

support.title: Support local communities
support.description: Village stays and experiences are presented as part of a wider ecosystem that benefits hosts, guides, and local infrastructure.

localFirst.title: Local-first storytelling
localFirst.description: We highlight the people, rituals, and everyday rhythms that make each destination distinct.

transparent.title: Transparent presentation
transparent.description: Rates, booking steps, and destination details are shown in a way that reduces friction and guesswork.

slowTravel.title: Designed for slow travel
slowTravel.description: The interface gives travelers room to explore, compare, and decide without feeling rushed.

sustainable.title: Built for long-term impact
sustainable.description: The platform emphasizes responsible tourism that can grow without erasing local character.

browse.title: Browse destinations
browse.description: Start with curated village stays and use the compare-ready layout to narrow down what fits your trip.

learn.title: Learn what matters
learn.description: Read concise descriptions, highlights, and experience details so you know what to expect before booking.

reserve.title: Reserve in one flow
reserve.description: Finish with a calm checkout process that keeps the next step obvious from start to finish.

cta.title: Ready to explore a slower way to travel?
cta.description: Browse the destinations we have curated and choose the village experience that matches your pace.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.description: Access your bookings, saved destinations, and travel preferences in one calm dashboard.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join to save destinations, manage bookings, and personalize your village travel experience.
